message:
fix: update pnpm-lock.yaml with @claude-flow/shared deps

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -441,15 +441,30 @@ importers:
         specifier: ^1.10.3
         version: 1.13.0
     devDependencies:
+      '@types/cors':
+        specifier: ^2.8.17
+        version: 2.8.19
+      '@types/express':
+        specifier: ^4.17.21
+        version: 4.17.25
+      '@types/helmet':
+        specifier: ^4.0.0
+        version: 4.0.0
       '@types/node':
         specifier: ^20.0.0
         version: 20.19.27
       '@types/sql.js':
         specifier: ^1.4.9
         version: 1.4.9
+      '@types/ws':
+        specifier: ^8.5.10
+        version: 8.18.1
       vitest:
         specifier: ^4.0.16
         version: 4.0.16(@opentelemetry/api@1.9.0)(@types/node@20.19.27)
+      zod:
+        specifier: ^3.22.4
+        version: 3.25.76
 
   '@claude-flow/swarm':
     devDependencies:
@@ -3900,6 +3915,13 @@ packages:
       '@types/node': 20.19.27
     dev: true
 
+  /@types/helmet@4.0.0:
+    resolution: {integrity: sha512-ONIn/nSNQA57yRge3oaMQESef/6QhoeX7llWeDli0UZIfz8TQMkfNPTXA8VnnyeA1WUjG2pGqdjEIueYonMdfQ==}
+    deprecated: This is a stub types definition. helmet provides its own type definitions, so you do not need this installed.
+    dependencies:
+      helmet: 7.2.0
+    dev: true
+
   /@types/http-assert@1.5.6:
     resolution: {integrity: sha512-TTEwmtjgVbYAzZYWyeHPrrtWnfVkm8tQkP8P21uQifPgMRgjrow3XDEYqucuC8SKZJT7pUnhU/JymvjggxO9vw==}
     requiresBuild: true
@@ -7013,7 +7035,6 @@ packages:
   /helmet@7.2.0:
     resolution: {integrity: sha512-ZRiwvN089JfMXokizgqEPXsl2Guk094yExfoDXR0cBYWxtBbaSww/w+vT4WEJsBW2iTUi1GgZ6swmoug3Oy4Xw==}
     engines: {node: '>=16.0.0'}
-    dev: false
 
   /helmet@8.1.0:
     resolution: {integrity: sha512-jOiHyAZsmnr8LqoPGmCjYAaiuWwjAPLgY8ZX2XrmHawt99/u1y6RgrZMTeoPfpUbV96HOalYgz1qzkRbw54Pmg==}
@@ -11171,7 +11192,6 @@ packages:
 
   /zod@3.25.76:
     resolution: {integrity: sha512-gzUt/qt81nXsFGKIFcC3YnfEAx5NkunCfnDlvuBSSFS02bcXu4Lmea0AFIUwbLWxWPx3d9p8S5QoaujKcNQxcQ==}
-    dev: false
 
   /zod@4.3.5:
     resolution: {integrity: sha512-k7Nwx6vuWx1IJ9Bjuf4Zt1PEllcwe7cls3VNzm4CQ1/hgtFUK2bRNG3rvnpPUhFjmqJKAKtjV576KnUkHocg/g==}
